Worst service

Swiggy has completely lost my trust as a customer. My issue was never properly addressed. Instead of offering a genuine resolution, I was unilaterally issued a coupon without my consent, even though I had requested a refund. To make matters worse, the coupon comes with restrictions and cannot even offset delivery charges, effectively forcing you to spend more money to use the so-called “compensation.”

Customer support repeatedly sent generic template responses and eventually marked my complaint as “resolved” despite the issue remaining unresolved. It felt like no one actually read or considered my grievance.

I have since filed a complaint through the appropriate consumer grievance channel because I believe customers deserve to be heard rather than brushed aside with automated replies.

After years of using Swiggy, this experience has convinced me to stop using the platform altogether. I’ll be supporting local restaurants directly instead. Extremely disappointing.
Not good kabhi bhi kese bhi bs order cancel  hota h

I’ve been using them over the years and I just had such a terrible experience with their customer service. An item I ordered did not get delivered. When I raised the issue, their response is simply that they cannot do anything about it. If you cannot do anything about something I ordered via your platform, you should not be running the service.

I just ordered pizza and this fraud app takes my location and knows everything thousand times they took order delivered it and now their so called fraudulent delivery partner canceled my order because he already ate and enjoyed it abd now he says i cant go because this adress it too far after waiting for one hour this fraud says me so and as if he disnt see the adress when he accepted the order and now he canceled it and have the two box of pizza and pepsi and now this fraud app is asking for cancellation fee which i have to pay because his fraud delivery partner already enjoyed it i am goin to report aginst tbis app and the delivery partner seriously

There was a glitch in the app and the item I was removing kept adding again and again. I still managed to remove it and placed the order and guess what the item again added at the time of time and money got decided. When I asked the support team to give me return option they said they cannot do it after wasting my one hour time. Rather than instamart, I suggest people to use other platforms when atleast the problem would be addressed properly

I was trying to get help for one order which got cancelled by Swiggy side. The Swiggy guy called me to cancel the order and instead of helping me he said you will get help from the Swiggy app chat. But when I am trying to get help from that cancelled order help section. I found there was only their predefined options to help the customers. So my option was not there. And there was no way for me to call any customer support agent. I am switching to other food delivery app.

I ordered food at 7:59 pm today and after one and half hour they cancelled the order and when i asked for full refund and compensation they said they will pay only 73 rupees as a compensation. What a joke. What a pathetic customer service by swiggy. I am installing the app.

I had a very disappointing experience. The jaggery (gud) I received appeared to have fungus, and it had a smell similar to alcohol. The roasted chana also tasted bitter, which made me question the product quality.

What disappointed me even more was the customer service. They refused to accept the return or provide a proper resolution.

Based on my experience, I would not recommend buying from this app until they improve both their product quality and customer support.

No solid way to cancel order. Help isn’t working at all. Show blank page only when I need it the most. Now my order is stuck. Restaurant not accepted, delivery guy is at restaurant and I can’t cancel it. Restaurant guy told me that he can’t cancel because he didn’t accepted order. 

Very frustrating is disgusting experience. Focus less on UI and more on refining the customer experience.

They just deliver bad rotten items and forget about it the loss is on the customer.
